name: Chrome-plated Metal Butt Door Hinge N166, Pack of 3
description:
Enhance the functionality and appearance of your doors with this premium Chrome-plated Metal Butt Door Hinge N166. Crafted from robust metal and finished with a sleek chrome plating, these hinges offer superior durability and resistance to wear, ensuring long-lasting performance.

Designed for smooth and reliable operation, each hinge provides sturdy support for your doors. The timeless butt hinge design makes them suitable for a wide range of interior applications, adding a touch of modern elegance to any entryway. This convenient pack of three ensures you have everything you need for multiple installations or replacements.
